programmes.label: ADHD & High Performance
programmes.sub: Decode your neurotype, then optimise it

hero.sub: We go beyond diagnosis. We decode the biology behind your mind — and the environment around it — to design a personalised path to sustained high performance, longevity and wellbeing.
hero.flagshipSub: A world-first integrated programme combining formal ADHD diagnostics, metabolic medicine, longevity technologies, psychedelic-state therapies and personalised Surf Your Life performance coaching.
hero.quote: The ADHD brain is not a broken lake that needs calming. It is a powerful ocean — and you were never taught to surf it.

impactStats.eyebrow: The Numbers No One Talks About
impactStats.heading: ADHD is not just a performance issue.
impactStats.body: These are not just cognitive challenges. Untreated ADHD drives metabolic dysfunction, accelerated cellular aging, chronic inflammation, and poor self-regulation of the exact health behaviours that determine how long and how well you live. This is why metabolic psychiatry and longevity medicine must work together — and why VitaReBa exists.

stats.label: Reduced life expectancy for adults with persistent ADHD
Higher risk of accidental injury, substance abuse and metabolic disease
Of ADHD adults have clinically significant sleep disorders affecting cellular recovery
ADHD presents a greater mortality risk than poor diet, inactivity, obesity and smoking — combined

pillars.heading: Three programmes.
pillars.sub: Each programme addresses a different entry point — but all share the same metabolic foundation, the same clinical rigour, and the same commitment to treating root causes, not symptoms.

metabolic.name: Metabolic Psychiatry
metabolic.desc: The overarching framework. We assess psychiatric conditions through metabolic, biological and physiological root causes — neuroinflammation, mitochondrial health, gut-brain axis, circadian rhythmics, and stress markers. Because mental health and longevity share the same biological foundation. Advanced diagnostics delivered via clinic sessions and home test kits.

adhd.name: ADHD for High Performers
adhd.desc: Our flagship programme featuring the proprietary SYL Clock — mapping your symptoms across four life dimensions: health, mindset, relationships and career. Formal diagnosis, metabolic workup, longevity medicine and 90 days of Surf Your Life transformation coaching.

psychedelic.name: Psychedelic Readiness
psychedelic.desc: A three-month structured preparation protocol combining physical diagnostics, metabolic optimisation and psychological readiness assessment. Emerging research shows psychedelics don't just support neuroplasticity — they may extend cellular lifespan, preserve telomeres, and promote healthier aging.

approach.heading: We diagnose
approach.sub: Standard psychiatry diagnoses and prescribes. We map the full biological picture and build a personalised architecture for your mind and body.

items.title: Metabolic Psychiatry
items.body: We assess the biological substrate of your mental performance — the body systems that directly regulate attention, arousal, mood and energy. No other clinic in Switzerland combines these layers in a single diagnostic protocol.

items.title: ADHD as a Performance System
items.body: ADHD is not a deficit. It is an asymmetric performance profile — with extraordinary peaks, real costs, and specific conditions under which it excels. We map your profile precisely and build the architecture that turns asymmetry into advantage.

items.title: Psychedelic-Assisted Therapy
items.body: Ketamine-assisted therapy and structured breathwork protocols within Swiss regulatory frameworks. We create windows of heightened neuroplasticity — and our three-month readiness programme ensures you enter these experiences from the strongest possible foundation.

items.title: International Patients
items.body: We receive patients from across Europe, the Middle East and beyond. Full concierge coordination for travel, accommodation and scheduling — complete discretion from first contact to final session.

steps.title: Inflection Edge Assessment
steps.text: Our proprietary 30-question, 5-dimension performance instrument. Produces your Neurotype Blueprint and frames the entire diagnostic conversation.

steps.title: Formal ADHD Diagnostic
steps.text: Comprehensive psychiatric assessment by our metabolic psychiatrist. Beyond checklists — we assess ADHD type, comorbidities, rejection sensitivity, executive function, and your specific performance phenotype.

steps.title: Full Metabolic Workup
steps.text: The assessment that sets VitaReBa apart. We examine the biological systems driving your presentation — gut-brain axis, neurotransmitters, mitochondrial function, hormones, micronutrients, toxins, HRV, circadian rhythm and more.

steps.title: Psychedelic-State Therapy
steps.text: Ketamine-assisted therapy and structured breathwork protocols inducing non-ordinary states — creating windows of heightened neuroplasticity. Research now shows psychedelics also preserve telomere length, upregulate longevity genes (SIRT1), and reduce oxidative stress at the cellular level.

steps.title: VitaReBa Technology Protocol
steps.text: ADHD reduces life expectancy by up to 13 years. Our longevity medicine technologies directly address this — mitochondrial health, nervous system recovery, cellular longevity, and the biological foundations of sustained cognitive performance.

steps.title: Surf Your Life + Home Harmony
steps.text: The coaching layer that converts clinical insights into daily architecture. You redesign how you work, lead, decide and recover — based on your specific neurotype. Includes a full audit of your personal and professional environments.

diagnostics.heading: The most complete
diagnostics.sub: Our metabolic workup examines six biological systems that directly influence cognitive performance, mood and energy. Available in-clinic and via home test kits for international patients.

sylClock.heading: The SYL Clock.
sylClock.body: The Surf Your Life Clock maps your ADHD symptoms across the four dimensions that matter most. Not just how your brain works — but how it shows up in every area of your life. The result is the most actionable performance map available.

health.name: Health
health.text: Energy, sleep, nutrition, exercise, substance use — the biological foundation everything else rests on.

mindset.name: Mindset
mindset.text: Focus patterns, emotional regulation, inner narrative, decision quality and cognitive performance under pressure.

relationships.name: Relationships
relationships.text: Communication patterns, rejection sensitivity, trust, intimacy and how your neurotype shapes your connections.

career.name: Career
career.text: Leadership style, productivity architecture, team dynamics, strategic thinking and professional trajectory.

psychedelicReadiness.heading: Three months.
psychedelicReadiness.sub: A structured protocol for anyone considering psychedelic-assisted therapy — whether with us or with a referral partner clinic. We ensure your body, metabolism and mind are optimally prepared.
psychedelicReadiness.calloutText: A 2025 study published in Nature's npj Aging found that psilocybin extended human cellular lifespan by up to 57%, preserved telomere length, and increased survival of aged mice by 30%. The compound upregulates SIRT1 — a key gene in longevity and DNA repair — and reduces oxidative stress at the cellular level. These findings suggest psychedelics may be potent geroprotective agents, making metabolic preparation even more critical.
psychedelicReadiness.calloutCite: Kato et al., npj Aging, 2025 · Emory University / Baylor College of Medicine

phases.title: Physical Diagnostics
phases.text: Full metabolic workup, cardiovascular assessment, medication review, and contraindication screening. We identify and address any biological factors that could affect your experience and its longevity benefits.

phases.title: Metabolic Optimisation
phases.text: Targeted supplementation, gut health protocol, sleep architecture improvement, and nervous system regulation. Building the biological foundation for both neuroplasticity and the cellular longevity effects of psychedelic therapy.

phases.title: Psychological Readiness
phases.text: Intention setting, breathwork training, mindfulness practice, and integration framework preparation. Ensuring you have the tools to process and sustain the insights that emerge — for lasting change.

psychedelicReadiness.footer: Available for individual clients and referral partners — psychedelic clinics, retreat centres, and medical practitioners seeking thorough pre-treatment preparation for their patients.

addiction.heading: Where ADHD ends
addiction.body1: ADHD and addiction are among the most frequently co-occurring conditions in high-performing adults. For many, substance use — alcohol, stimulants, prescription medications — begins as self-medication for an undiagnosed or undertreated ADHD brain.
addiction.body2: We offer exclusive, fully private addiction treatment in Switzerland — integrated with the complete metabolic and psychiatric picture. Not a clinic setting. Not an institutional programme. A discreet, evidence-based, deeply personal process.

cards.label: Fully Private
cards.text: No clinical setting. No institutional record. Complete discretion from first contact to final session.

cards.label: Dual Diagnosis
cards.text: ADHD and addiction treated together — not sequentially. The metabolic root causes of both are addressed simultaneously.

cards.label: Switzerland-Based
cards.text: Access to world-class Swiss medical infrastructure, legal therapeutic frameworks, and an environment of absolute safety.

cards.label: International Clients
cards.text: Full concierge coordination. We receive clients from across Europe, the Middle East and beyond.

edge_diagnostic.desc: The most complete ADHD biological picture available in Switzerland. Formal diagnosis, full metabolic workup, and your personalised Neurotype Blueprint.

riding_the_wave.desc: The complete integrated programme — clinical diagnosis, biological optimisation, longevity medicine, and 90 days of Surf Your Life transformation coaching.

total_longevity.desc: The comprehensive annual architecture — ongoing biological monitoring, regular consultations, psychedelic therapy, and continuous performance optimisation.

manuel.bio: The architect behind VitaReBa's integrated approach. Combining performance coaching with metabolic psychiatry to build the life architecture high-performing minds need.

montagna.bio: Specialist in metabolic psychiatry with deep expertise in ADHD, addiction and the biological substrates of cognitive performance.

cta.heading: Your ocean.
cta.sub: Start with the Inflection Edge — our free ADHD performance assessment. In 8 minutes you will have the most precise picture of your neurotype you have ever seen. Your results are your Epoch — the beginning of a new chapter.

footer.legal: All psychedelic therapies within Swiss regulatory frameworks

assessment.subtitle: Your neurotype. Mapped precisely.
assessment.intro: {count} questions · {dims} dimensions · One precision performance blueprint mapping when your ADHD brain operates at its ceiling — and what is currently preventing it.
assessment.disclaimer: Grounded in peer-reviewed research. Not a clinical diagnostic tool.
questions: I can reliably get myself into a productive state when I need to.
My energy levels are consistent throughout the day.
I need external pressure (deadlines, consequences) to start important tasks.
I know my peak performance windows and schedule my most important work in them.
I often feel mentally exhausted despite not having done much.
Caffeine or stimulants are essential for me to function normally.
I generate more ideas than most people around me.
My best ideas come at unexpected, inconvenient times.
I can effectively capture and develop my ideas into finished outputs.
People describe me as creative or unconventional in my thinking.
I often start new projects before finishing existing ones.
My creative output directly contributes to my professional success.
When I am deeply engaged, I lose track of time completely.
I can deliberately enter a state of deep focus when I choose to.
My hyperfocus episodes are productive rather than consuming.
I struggle to shift attention from one task to another when needed.
I have strategies to protect my deep work from interruption.
My best work happens in intense bursts rather than steady effort.
My mood can shift dramatically within a single day.
I make impulsive decisions I later regret.
I can manage my emotional reactions in professional settings.
Rejection or criticism affects me more intensely than it seems to affect others.
My performance variance frustrates the people around me.
I have reliable strategies for recovering from emotional lows.
My workspace is designed to support my focus and productivity.
I have clear boundaries between work and personal time.
The people around me understand how my brain works.
I regularly feel overwhelmed by my physical environment.
My daily routine supports my cognitive performance.
I have deliberately designed my life around how my brain works best.

deepFriction.name: Deep Friction
deepFriction.text: Your ADHD profile is producing significant friction across multiple dimensions. The biological and structural interventions are clear — and so is the magnitude of what becomes available when they're addressed.

managedTension.name: Managed Tension
managedTension.text: You have developed coping strategies, but the underlying tension between your neurotype and your environment is still producing real costs. The work is moving from coping to designing.

asymmetricPerformance.name: Asymmetric Performance
asymmetricPerformance.text: You have significant strengths and specific vulnerabilities. This is the profile most responsive to targeted intervention — because the foundation is already strong.

optimisedNeurotype.name: Optimised Neurotype
optimisedNeurotype.text: Your ADHD profile is largely working for you. The refinement available at this level is precision optimisation — fine-tuning the edges to extract the full potential of your neurotype.

arousal.low: Your activation system is largely externally driven. You rely on urgency, novelty or crisis to get started. This is the most energy-expensive way to operate — and it's the pattern most responsive to biological intervention.
arousal.mid: You have partial control over your activation but it's inconsistent. Some days you can self-start; others you can't. The variability itself is the signal — it points to biological fluctuation that can be stabilised.
arousal.high: Your arousal system is well-regulated. You can reliably get yourself into a productive state. The remaining work is optimising your peak windows and reducing the energy cost of activation.

divergent.low: Your creative output is either suppressed or not being captured effectively. ADHD brains generate enormous creative potential — if yours isn't visible, the environment is likely the bottleneck, not the brain.
divergent.mid: You generate substantial creative output but struggle to convert it into finished work. The gap between ideation and execution is your highest-leverage intervention point.
divergent.high: Your divergent thinking is a well-deployed asset. The work now is building systems that protect and channel this capacity so it compounds rather than scatters.

hyperfocus.low: Hyperfocus is either rare or uncontrolled — happening to you rather than for you. Shifting to deliberately designed hyperfocus is the highest-leverage change available.
hyperfocus.mid: You experience hyperfocus regularly but can't always direct it. The work is building triggers, protection and exit strategies so you can deploy this capacity strategically.
hyperfocus.high: Hyperfocus is a well-understood, regularly deployed asset. The refinement now is building better protection for these states once they are activated.

volatility.low: Your performance volatility is producing significant real-world costs in decisions, relationships and health. This requires biological and structural intervention — not discipline, but design.
volatility.mid: Your volatility is manageable but costly in ways others absorb more than you see. The work is raising your baseline floor through biological stabilisation and structural support.
volatility.high: You have reasonable control over your performance variation. The remaining work is building a more consistent baseline so the people around you can rely on which version of you shows up.

environment.low: There is a large gap between the environment you currently work in and the one your brain needs. This is likely the single biggest drag on your performance — and the most fixable problem in your profile.
environment.mid: You understand your environmental needs partially but haven't fully designed around them. Deliberate redesign of your workspace, schedule and team structure will compound every other intervention.
environment.high: You have built an environment that works with your neurotype. The task now is protecting it as the complexity of your life and business increases.

results.ctaSub: A 30-minute discovery call with {clinicianName} translates these scores into a concrete plan — which dimensions to address first, what interventions are available, and what a {shortName} programme looks like for your specific profile.
